requirement: Each snapshot names its source and acquisition time

ratingResult.rationale: The current manifest names the generated file but omits upstream source and acquisition time for the newest snapshot. A reader cannot trace the published data without maintainer knowledge, so the requirement does not meet the acceptable floor.

findings.observation: The newest station snapshot lists the output file and row count but leaves the upstream source and acquisition timestamp blank.

evidence.ref: manifest provenance re-check before report generation
